chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.S-1084 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders on office objection Nos.1 to 5 a/w reply as at A 2. For hearing of main case 08.12.2025 Mr. Rameez Raja Solangi, advocate for the petitioner Ms. Rahat Ehsan, DPG Mr. Pervaiz Ahmed Mastoi, AAG --------- Since prayer clause (a) pertains to quashment of FIR No.967 of 2025 registered at PS Humak District Islamabad which falls outside the criminal appellate jurisdiction of this Court, therefore, same cannot be quashed even specific prayer in that regard has not been made. As far as rest of the prayer clauses are concerned, the petitioners seek indulgence of this Court to direct the respondents to provide them protection. It is the case of the petitioner No.1 Mrs. Sumaira Zafar that she has contracted marriage of her own freewill with petitioner No.2 Yasir. Un-ceremonial marriage has invited agony of her parents and their relatives were bent out to kill them under the pretext of honor. Mr. Aijaz Shirazi, advocate for the respondent, submits that the petitioner was already married to one Qaiser Shahzad which fact has been strongly disputed by the petitioner and submitted that she was not married to Qaiser Shahzad and this is her first marriage. Since FIR No. 967 of 2025 has been registered at PS Humak District Islamabad, therefore, the petitioner shall not be arrested in the said FIR. However, for the purpose of quashment, petitioners may approach the concerned Court, if so advised. Learned DPG and APG have undertaken that SHO PS Steel Town, Malir and SSP District Malir shall conduct themselves in accordance with law and shall provide protection to the petitioners as and when required to which learned counsel for the petitioner seeks disposal of this petition.

However, for the purpose of quashment, petitioners may approach the concerned Court, if so advised. Learned DPG and APG have undertaken that SHO PS Steel Town, Malir and SSP District Malir shall conduct themselves in accordance with law and shall provide protection to the petitioners as and when required to which learned counsel for the petitioner seeks disposal of this petition. Order accordingly. Official respondents are directed to ensure that the petitioners are provided due protection of law. This petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith pending applications. A copy of this order shall be sent to SHO PS Steel Town and SSP District Malir for compliance. JUDGE Nadir*
